scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
